channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Urgent fridge added to the flytip, 13th July
item.description:
A fridge has been added to the flying, yhe door hasn't been removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

On front grass if 22 The Covert The house belongs to an elderly gentleman.

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Dead fox, 13th July

item.title: This car is parked in a no parking turn round bay the back off car is parked across pavement blocking people walking, 13th July
item.description:
This car is parked in a no parking turn round bay the back off car is parked across pavement blocking people walking past

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Daniel Close, Edmonton

item.title: People moving house and left the Rubbish on the recycling bin and the foul smell from the communal bin is like a dead animal., 13th July
item.description:
The smell from the bins is like dead animals. It’s happened since the tenant from no. 76 moving out.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanswood Gardens, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faeces in street. Millions of flies, a foul stench., 13th July
item.description:
See above.

Came down overnight.

item.title: Black Audi PL10WFW abandoned on road outside no 160. Has been left with window ajar for approximately 4 weeks. Window has now been taken out presumably to look for vsluables, 13th July
item.description:
Afraid that now the windows gone it might suffer further damage
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 160, Welling Way, Falconwood, Greater London

Dresser left on pavement

item.title: Idling vehicle, 13th July
item.description:
White Van Vehicle idling outside 4 Homer St for around 40 Mins
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car wash, 13th July
item.description:
You've cleaned our street this morning. Now at 12 it's already filthy again. Car wash staff is still littering our street. Please force them to comply or shut their business down. They also steal parcels and insult and harass residents. WE'VE HAD ENOUGH.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rosina Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on grass, 13th July
item.description:
2 black bags and red bag of household waste dumped by the 2nd to end tree towards Westhorne Avenue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westhorne Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tips, 13th July
item.description:
There are a few fly tips of wooden pallets and a table on Walter’s yard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walters Yard, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red rubbish bag entrance to bungalows., 13th July
item.description:
Red bag of household waste dumped on the grass by the entrance of the bungalows. Also on the other side of the fence is a trolley and a metal cage broken down which I imagine will end up on the grass as well.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rancliffe Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
